doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: This document describes a "waiver" of unauthorized practice of law regulations that does not exist in California law and uses a non-existent protocol title.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The State Bar of California has not authorized paralegals to draft motions without pre-filing attorney supervision, and no such "EAJP-2025" protocol exists in official records.
